clusters.label: Chemistry Foundations
clusters.desc: Constants, stoichiometry, atomic structure, gas laws, acid-base, thermo, kinetics

clusters.label: Organic Reactivity
clusters.desc: Functional groups, reaction mechanisms, stereochemistry, NMR/IR/MS

clusters.label: Biomolecules & Metabolism
clusters.desc: Proteins, enzymes, glycolysis, TCA, oxidative phosphorylation, photosynthesis

clusters.label: Cellular Machinery
clusters.desc: Membranes, transport, ER/Golgi, cytoskeleton, vesicle trafficking

clusters.label: Genetic Information
clusters.desc: DNA replication, transcription, translation, genetics, bioinformatics

clusters.label: Immunity & Disease
clusters.desc: Innate/adaptive immunity, vaccines, autoimmunity, infectious disease

clusters.label: Acid-Base & Buffers
clusters.desc: pH, Ka/Kb, buffer systems, Henderson-Hasselbalch, equivalence points

clusters.label: Thermodynamics & Equilibrium
clusters.desc: Gibbs free energy, equilibrium constant, reaction quotient, Le Chatelier's principle

clusters.label: Electrochemistry
clusters.desc: Cell potential, electrolysis, Nernst equation, Faraday constant, redox

clusters.label: Membrane Transport & Endocytosis
clusters.desc: Endocytosis, phagocytosis, receptor-mediated uptake -- shared across cell biology and immunology

clusters.label: Cancer, Cell Death & Gene Regulation
clusters.desc: Oncogenes, apoptosis/necrosis, enhancers, CRISPR, pleiotropy -- shared across genetics and immunology
